economic_notes: Fox Lake Cree Nation holds 5% interest (350 Class K and 150 Class E units) in Keeyask Hydro Power Limited Partnership at cost of $54,541,666. Multiple joint ventures with Sodexo Canada and others providing food, housekeeping, janitorial, security, and mechanical services to Manitoba Hydro camps. Ventures LP involved in hydroelectric development projects. Gaming centre and smoke shop operations. Gillam Insurance Agency Ltd. provides general and autopac insurance.
notes: Audit is qualified on three bases: (1) accounts receivable completeness/valuation/existence due to sub-ledger issues, (2) accounts payable existence/completeness due to missing invoices and sub-ledger issues, (3) joint venture rights/obligations/valuation due to unavailability of information. Audit report dated May 24, 2022, over two years after fiscal year end. Prior year 2019 also had a qualified opinion from a different auditor. Large Manitoba Hydro loan of $61,469,081 (including $7,377,414 accrued interest) dominates long-term debt. Investment in Keeyask Hydro Power LP at cost of $54,541,666. Total investments of $74,755,730. Net financial assets not explicitly stated on statement provided; housing expenses combined Band Housing $2,336,765 and CMHC Housing $149,906. Capital lease obligation of $235,855 also exists. Province is Manitoba.
